steps.title: Use the nearby reference
steps.content: The phrase refers to the sisters' dolls and giggling. The narrator says he spoke very little to his sisters and did not concern himself with those activities, showing distance or lack of interest rather than action.

steps.title: Match the phrase in context
steps.content: A means buy, B suggests anger, and D means create. In context, not concerning himself with those things means not taking interest in or involving himself with his sisters' activities. The answer is C.
